data.current_description: Webhook to notify a booking has been updated
data.summary_suggestion: Receive booking update webhook notification
data.description_suggestion: Webhook endpoint that receives POST notifications when a booking status changes. This is a passive endpoint that your system should implement to receive real-time booking updates from Bookaway. The webhook will include the booking details and the type of update (e.g., approved, cancelled, confirmed). Your endpoint must respond with HTTP 200 status to acknowledge receipt. Updates can also be retrieved via the Booking API status endpoint if webhook delivery is not preferred.

Please note that some transfers also has extras and additional passenger information  which  require to provide in the booking request.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all available transfers with details
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a complete JSON file containing all available transfers (bus, train, ferry, private car services) with static information including images, descriptions, and amenities. This is a static endpoint that should be cached daily. Note: Some transfers require additional information (extras, passenger details) during booking. Refer to the transfer's `hasExtraUserInputRequired` flag to determine if trip details must be fetched before booking. No authentication required.
